name: Grootslang

abilities.name: Prepared Lairs
abilities.text: During the start phase of turn 1, make two Bog markers anywhere on the friendly table half.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Riddled with Tunnels
abilities.text: When another ally activates within 2" of this model, the ally may drain a (soulstone) and use its Walk action to declare this model's Lair to Lair action.

actions.name: Eyeless Swipes
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If there are no different enemy models within 2" of the target, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Slink Away
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with a marker within 6".

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your face deck. This model may discard it.

triggers.name: Pull and Drag
triggers.text: Move the target 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Hexed Gambit
triggers.text: Target must have a Stunned token. This model may discard and draw a card.

actions.name: Create Lair
actions.effects: Make a Bog marker within range.

actions.name: Lair to Lair
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Bog marker, ignoring LoS.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target. This model gains a Craven token.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 1 to 11, confirming health value of 11
Faction determined from owl icon in top-left corner (Neverborn)
Soulstone icon in ability text rendered as (soulstone)
Walk action keyword preserved in bold context
